zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena de Baguley於1280年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓時，她的父親William de Baguley II26歲，母親Lady Lucy de Corona38歲。她於1297年之前與John de Legh Venables I在英國爾阿德林頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年7月在英國英格蘭爾諾波利享年72歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena de Baguley于1280年出生在英国英格兰爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲William de Baguley II26岁，母亲Lady Lucy de Corona38岁。她于1297年之前与John de Legh Venables I在英国爾阿德林頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年7月在英国英格兰爾諾波利享年72岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena de Baguley was born in 1280, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Baguley II, was 26 and her mother, Lady Lucy de Corona, was 38. She married John de Legh Venables I before 1297, in Adlington, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in July 1352, in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elena de Baguley est née en 1280, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Baguley II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Lucy de Corona, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé John de Legh Venables I avant 1297, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1352, à Norbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elena de Baguley 1280 in Adlington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Baguley II 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Lucy de Corona 38. Sie hat vor 1297 in Adlington, Cheshire, England John de Legh Venables I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1352 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Norbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elena de Baguley è nata il nel 1280 nel Adlington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Baguley II, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Lucy de Corona, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato John de Legh Venables I prima del 1297, nel Adlington, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1352, nel Norbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena de Baguleyが1280年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父William de Baguley IIは26歳，母Lady Lucy de Coronaは38歳であった。1297年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンでJohn de Legh Venables Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年7月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノーブリーで72歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elena de Baguley(이)가 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Baguley II(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Lucy de Corona(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1297년 이전 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 John de Legh Venables I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르버이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John de Legh Venables I antes 1297, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena de Baguley родилась в 1280 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Baguley II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Lucy de Corona, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Legh Venables I перед 1297 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла июль 1352 г. в местности норбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena de Baguley nació en 1280, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Baguley II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Lucy de Corona, tenía 38 años. Se casó con John de Legh Venables I antes de 1297, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en julio de 1352, en Norbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
